title: astragalus tegetarius var. elatus
intro: Astragalus tegetarius var. elatus, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a type of plant belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to Mongolia and parts of China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus tegetarius var. elatus include reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. It is typically prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
